name: Savory Lamb Kabobs
recipeIngredient: 2 large Green peppers, cut into 1-inch pieces
recipeInstructions:
1. Remove the membrane (tissue-like covering) from the leg of lamb and cut the meat into 1-inch cubes.
2. Combine soy sauce, vinegar, oil, minced garlic, sugar, and pepper in a bowl.
3. Add the lamb to the marinade and cover. Refrigerate overnight to marinate.
4. Remove the meat from the marinade, reserving the marinade for brushing on the kabobs.
5. Alternate cubes of lamb and vegetables (green peppers cut into 1-inch pieces, cherry tomatoes, and small onions) on skewers.
6. Grill the skewers over medium coals for 15 to 20 minutes, turning occasionally, until the meat reaches the desired level of doneness. Brush with marinade during cooking.
